expectations.text: Response uses search_traffic (not list_requests) to find auth-related traffic
Response uses searchIn: 'request_headers' to target authorization headers
Response uses a regex pattern that would match Authorization headers or Bearer tokens
expectations.evidence: Pattern 'Bearer |Authorization|api.?key' matches both Authorization header name and Bearer keyword

expectations.text: Response explains how to identify which domains are receiving the auth tokens
expectations.evidence: Domain table with api.yourapp.com (expected) vs analytics.thirdparty-tracker.io, logs.datadogservice.net, telemetry.unknown-cdn.xyz (suspicious)
